name: Cookieware
description:
Artist is @Hogakku_ on Twitter. Their art is so immaculate, check them out.

I hope you think with your head here, and not with your heart. Cause this lass ain't what she seems! Hope you are good at cooking, she'll like it. And I hope you keep YOUR TRAP SHUT AND DON'T CRITICIZE HER COOKING! Seriously though, she ain't a fan of that.
